name: diag-perf-button
description: Click the bottom-toolbar Perf button + capture. Want to see if opening the perf panel actually does something to the UI darkness, and what edges look like at the same time.

commands: (async () => { await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 1000)); const btns = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('button')).filter(b => /^Perf$/i.test(b.textContent || '')); if (btns.length === 0) return { error: 'no Perf button found' }; btns[0].click(); await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 600)); return { perfButtonsFound: btns.length, perfPanelDomCount: document.querySelectorAll('.perf-panel').length }; })()
